# Merge a Nuke Wiki

> Independent fan-made strategy wiki for Merge a Nuke on Roblox — not affiliated with Roblox Corporation or Nuke The Game.

Last updated: 2026-06-18

## Quick answer

Working codes (June 2026): ATOMIC ($10,000 + 20 nukes), UPDATE2 ($10,000 + 10 nukes), BOOM ($5,000). New players: redeem codes → merge same-level pairs (2+2=4) → buy Spawn Speed then Spawn Tier → lock base before raiding.

## Primary guides

- https://mergeanuke.site/ — Wiki hub with codes, beginner route, tier list, raid tips, and FAQ
- https://mergeanuke.site/codes — Active codes, rewards, redeem steps
- https://mergeanuke.site/beginner-guide — First steps, merge rules, early mistakes
- https://mergeanuke.site/upgrades — Store upgrade priority for free players
- https://mergeanuke.site/progression — Stage-by-stage growth path
- https://mergeanuke.site/tier-list — Merge levels and community-reported nuke names
- https://mergeanuke.site/raid — PvP raids, center city, Lock Base defense
- https://mergeanuke.site/offline-cash — Passive income and pre-logout setup
- https://mergeanuke.site/faq — Full FAQ including rebirth and code troubleshooting

## Data notes

- Codes and balance can change after Friday game updates.
- Tier names and some stats are community-reported — verify in the in-game Index.
- Official game: Roblox experience by Nuke The Game.

## Contact

- Email: contact@mergeanuke.site
- Privacy: https://mergeanuke.site/privacy
- Terms: https://mergeanuke.site/terms
